reason: Verified QA-20260512-022827-cugd agent responds correctly to math question with answer "4"
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded SuperAgent application with sidebar showing three agents including the target agent QA-20260512-022827-cugd
Step 2: Found and clicked "QA-20260512-022827-cugd" agent in sidebar - Successfully selected the agent and navigated to its detail page
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Confirmed status is "idle" (shown in the top right corner of the agent detail page)

Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Successfully typed the message into the input box and sent it using Cmd+Enter; new session "Simple Math Question Session" was created and message appeared in chat
Step 5: Waited up to 3 minutes for a response - Agent responded within 3 minutes (worked for 1 second as indicated)

Step 6: Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Agent's response clearly displays "4" as the answer to the math question; screenshot captured showing the complete response with "4" and "Worked for 1s" timestamp
